channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Fed chief Powell confirms Trump is stuck with him until criminal probe is ‘well and truly’ over
item.description: [Straits Times] While Powell’s term as chair is set to expire in mid-May, his seat on the Fed board does not expire until Jan 31, 2028.

item.title: David Sacks’ big Iran warning gets big time ignored
item.description: [The Verge AI] Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about the politics of technology and the technology of politics - now landing in your inbox on Wednesdays! If someone has forwarded this email to you, and you're not a Verge subscriber yet, you should sign up right here, and not just

item.title: ChatGPT did not cure a dog’s cancer
item.description: [The Verge AI] When an Australian tech entrepreneur with no background in biology or medicine said ChatGPT helped save his dog from cancer, the story spread with the kind of validation Big Tech has long craved: proof that AI will revolutionize medicine and take on one of its deadliest diseases. The reality, as usu

item.title: Why Walmart and OpenAI Are Shaking Up Their Agentic Shopping Deal
item.description: [WIRED AI] After OpenAI’s Instant Checkout feature fell short, Walmart is instead embedding its Sparky chatbot directly into ChatGPT and Google Gemini.

item.title: Quantum pioneers win Turing Award for encryption breakthrough
item.description: [BBC Technology] It is hoped Charles H Bennett and Gilles Brassard's work will make digital communications secure for decades ahead.

item.title: Government backtracks on AI and copyright after outcry from major artists
item.description: [BBC Technology] However, the government's position is now unclear, saying it "no longer has a preferred option" for what to do next.

item.title: 3 ways to reduce bias in AI with better context
item.description: [MarTech] AI bias often starts before the model runs. Missing context, flawed prompts and assumptions distort outputs. Here's how to correct them. The post 3 ways to reduce bias in AI with better context appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: DLSS 5: Has Nvidia’s AI graphics technology gone too far?
item.description: [The Verge AI] Nvidia has revealed a new “3D guided neural rendering model” called DLSS 5 that can change a game’s lighting and materials in real-time, and… many gamers aren’t happy. From DLSS 5 memes to complaints about how it’s “yassified” Resident Evil Requiem characters in demos, the first impression has not b

item.title: Ad for AI editing app which said it could 'remove anything' banned
item.description: [BBC Technology] The UK regulator said the ad condoned "digitally altering and exposing women's bodies without their consent."

item.title: Nvidia faces gamer backlash over 'breakthrough' AI graphics feature
item.description: [BBC Technology] Nvidia says the tool will transform game graphics - critics warn it could squeeze out artistic expression.

item.title: Middle managers are the missing link in AI adoption
item.description: [MarTech] Executives set the vision and teams test tools, but transformation happens in the middle. Equip managers to drive AI-powered workflow change. The post Middle managers are the missing link in AI adoption appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: AI firm Anthropic seeks weapons expert to stop users from 'misuse'
item.description: [BBC Technology] The artificial intelligence firm says it wants to prevent "catastrophic misuse" of its systems.

item.title: OpenAI plans desktop 'superapp' to simplify user experience, WSJ reports
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Jeff Bezos reportedly wants $100 billion to buy and transform old manufacturing firms with AI
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The Amazon magnate has a new project centered around acquiring industrial firms and revamping them with AI technology.

item.title: US stocks cut losses on Netanyahu war comments as energy prices soar again
item.description: [CNA Tech] Wall Street trimmed losses as energy surged after Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu said the war could end “a lot faster than people think”.

item.title: ‘Uncanny Valley’: Nvidia’s ‘Super Bowl of AI,’ Tesla Disappoints, and Meta’s VR Metaverse ‘Shutdown’
item.description: [WIRED AI] In this episode, we dive into Nvidia’s annual developer conference and what CEO Jensen Huang is saying about the future of the company.

item.title: Nvidia to sell 1 million chips to Amazon by end of 2027 in cloud deal
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Winklevosses' Gemini Space Station sued by shareholders over strategy, departures
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Exclusive-German semiconductor group Elmos exploring a sale, sources say
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Online bot traffic will exceed human traffic by 2027, Cloudflare CEO says
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] AI bots may outnumber humans online by 2027, says Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince, as generative AI agents dramatically increase web traffic and infrastructure demands.

item.title: A rogue AI led to a serious security incident at Meta
item.description: [The Verge AI] For almost two hours last week, Meta employees had unauthorized access to company and user data thanks to an AI agent that gave an employee inaccurate technical advice, as previously reported by The Information. Meta spokesperson Tracy Clayton said in a statement to The Verge that "no user data was

item.title: Google Shakes Up Its Browser Agent Team Amid OpenClaw Craze
item.description: [WIRED AI] As Silicon Valley obsesses over a new wave of AI coding agents, Google and other AI labs are shifting their bets.

item.title: Meta rolls out new AI content enforcement systems while reducing reliance on third-party vendors
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Meta believes these AI systems can detect more violations with greater accuracy, better prevent scams, respond more quickly to real-world events, and reduce over-enforcement.

item.title: Ecolab close to buying KKR's data center cooling company for up to $5 billion, WSJ reports
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: DoorDash launches a new ‘Tasks’ app that pays couriers to submit videos to train AI
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Delivery couriers will be able to earn money by completing activities like filming everyday tasks or recording themselves speaking in another language.

item.title: ChatGPT’s ‘Adult Mode’ Could Spark a New Era of Intimate Surveillance
item.description: [WIRED AI] OpenAI plans to allow sexting with ChatGPT. A human-AI interaction expert warns of a privacy nightmare.

item.title: The latest AI-powered martech news and releases
item.description: [MarTech] AI is delivering its clearest ROI so far not in marketing, but in fraud, where criminals are scaling persuasion faster and more effectively than most businesses. The post The latest AI-powered martech news and releases appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 nominations are still open
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Nominate your startup, or one you know, for TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 before May 27. Chance to win $100,000 equity-free funding and VC access.

item.title: 民营加油站龙头跨界半导体！拟5.4亿控股奎芯科技；前家电第一巨头拟8元出售资不抵债子公司；【并购一线】
item.description: [钛媒体] 3月18日最新并购信息及价值分析。

item.title: Alibaba DingTalk CEO: Two Major Structural Opportunities Behind Tokenomics
item.description: [钛媒体] AI will bring an enormous digital workforce, fundamentally reshaping the future business models of technology companies.

item.title: Signal’s Creator Is Helping Encrypt Meta AI
item.description: [WIRED AI] Moxie Marlinspike says the technology powering his encrypted AI chatbot, Confer, will be integrated into Meta AI. The move could help protect the AI conversations of millions of people.

item.title: ActiveCampaign extends its AI capabilities with context and scale
item.description: [MarTech] ActiveCampaign’s new AI tools alert you to what’s working in your campaigns and beyond and how to fix what isn’t — no prompting required. The post ActiveCampaign extends its AI capabilities with context and scale appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: AI is reshaping what entry-level marketing work looks like
item.description: [MarTech] AI is transforming entry-level marketing roles from execution to oversight, forcing teams to rethink how junior talent contributes and grows. The post AI is reshaping what entry-level marketing work looks like appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Adobe’s AI image generator can now be trained on your own art
item.description: [The Verge AI] Adobe is launching customizable AI image generators that can mimic specific artistic styles and character designs. The Firefly Custom Models are available in public beta starting today, allowing creators and brands to train a model on their own assets to ensure generated images follow a consistent a

item.title: 5.5亿再启跨界“棋局”，包装纸龙头“豪赌”国产GPU芯片 | 并购一线
item.description: [钛媒体] 此次5.5亿元的投资，对于大胜达来说是战略卡位还是豪赌？

item.title: 阿里财报电话会：闪购拉动电商大盘活跃买家增长1.5亿，预计29财年盈利
item.description: [钛媒体] 3月19日晚间，阿里巴巴电商事业群CEO蒋凡在财报分析师会议上表示，维持即时零售整体GMV在2028财年过1万亿的目标，并预计在2029财年实现整体盈利，未来两年将以这一目标坚定投入，同时实现市场地位领先。

item.title: Amazon brings Alexa+ to the UK
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The company is currently letting users in the U.K. try out Alexa+ for free via an early access program.

item.title: Fitbit’s AI health coach will soon be able to read your medical records
item.description: [The Verge AI] Would you share your medical records with a personal trainer? How about a virtual one? Google, which this week announced it is giving Fitbit's AI health coach the ability to read your medical records, is hoping the answer is yes, following rivals like Amazon, OpenAI, and Microsoft in betting that us

item.title: 2026年，塌房最快的AI公司出现了
item.description: [钛媒体] 抄袭，是AI创业的底色？

item.title: 小米“神秘模型”，为何被错认为DeepSeek V4？
item.description: [钛媒体] 为什么一个手机大厂的模型，会被全世界开发者集体误认为是DeepSeek的下一代神作？

item.title: UOB chief Wee Ee Cheong’s pay down 20% to $12 million in 2025
item.description: [Straits Times] This was mainly due to a smaller bonus.

item.title: Singapore stocks fall as Fed holds firm on rates; STI down 0.7%
item.description: [Straits Times] Across the broader market, losers beat gainers 427 to 181.

item.title: 氪星晚报｜澳大利亚就业依然强劲，支持澳央行的鹰派立场；首款国产化“龙虾云电脑”发布；法官下令恢复美国之音员工职务，推翻特朗普关停决定
item.description: [36氪] 大公司： 马斯克：SpaceX AI和特斯拉预计将继续大规模订购英伟达芯片 马斯克发文称，非常欣赏英伟达和黄仁勋，英伟达市值实至名归，SpaceX AI和特斯拉预计将继续大规模订购英伟达芯片。 三星电子计划在2026年至少投入110万亿韩元用于研发与设施建设 三星电子计划在2026年至少投入110万亿韩元用于研发与设施建设。 小马智行与如祺出行共建Robotaxi车队，首批交付超百辆第七代无人车 36氪获悉，3月19日，小马智行向如祺出行正式交付搭载小马智行第七代自动驾驶系统的全新广汽埃安霸王龙Robotaxi，首批交付超百辆，这批车辆已接入如祺出行平台并陆续开展运营。

item.title: The Fight to Hold AI Companies Accountable for Children’s Deaths
item.description: [WIRED AI] After a series of suicides allegedly linked to AI chatbots, one lawyer is trying to hold companies like OpenAI accountable.

item.title: AWE 2026观察：AI重构家庭空间
item.description: [36氪] 作者：王利 编辑：王小坤 想象一下，你身处一间密闭场所，四周音箱环绕。接着，音乐响起，声音从不同方向传来：有的掠过头顶，有的在左耳回响，每个声源的位置都清晰可辨。随后，你戴上一副耳机。奇怪的是，耳机隔音似乎并不好，外面声音清晰依旧。听了一会，你有些腻了，摘下耳机，才发现四周的音箱早已关闭——刚才以为仍由音箱播放的音乐，其实一直出自耳机。 这是发生AWE2026的一幕，来自索尼的音频系统。 这项技术名为“360VME”，旨在测量个人在特定空间里的听觉特征与声场结构，并生成一份个性化声学档案。之后，无论身处何地，用户只需戴上耳机，就可以还原该空间的声音环境。 据工作人员介绍：“

item.title: 超级创业者时代：如何让个人拥有组织级能力
item.description: [36氪] 序章｜一个人，就是一家公司：第四次个体经济浪潮正在爆发 历史上每一次生产关系的重构，都诞生于旧有组织形态的瓶颈与新技术力量的碰撞。从1980年代的街头个体户，到1999年《个人独资企业法》确立的法人主体，再到2014年“大众创业、万众创新”的移动互联网浪潮——中国个体经济政策的每一次跃升，都是时代的一次集体答卷。 而今天，随着Agent、OpenClaw等基础设施普及，为超级创业者提供了以AI技术为基础，驱动创新变革的天然契机。OPC（One Person Company，一人公司）、SE（Super Entrepreneur，超级创业者）等创新模式，正在推动第四次浪潮已然到来。

item.title: 腾讯不愿在微信里躺平
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 张帆 黄绎达 编辑 | 黄绎达 腾讯依旧还是那个稳健的腾讯。 3月18日，腾讯公布了2025年全年业绩。财报数据显示，公司在2025年实现收入7518亿元，同比增长14%；同期实现经营利润2416亿元，同比增长16%；同期Non-IFRS归母净利润录得2596亿元，同比增长17%。 作为中国市场最核心标的之一，稳健一直是腾讯的标签，2025年的业绩也总体符合市场预期。然而，在如今的AI浪潮下，投资者关注的核心点恐怕并不是腾讯的业绩表现，而是公司在AI上的作为。 本次业绩发布会上，公司管理层披露，2025年腾讯对AI新产品的投

item.title: Amazon's Alexa has had an AI upgrade. Now she's got more to say
item.description: [BBC Technology] There has been criticism the Echo has stagnated, while other AI chatbots have become much easier to communicate with.

item.title: Investors face cloudier Fed rate view as Iran war grips markets
item.description: [Straits Times] Rate cut bets pull back as oil prices soar.

item.title: 揭秘蔚来芯片分拆始末，正积极接触多头部车企 | 36氪独家
item.description: [36氪] 3月10日，蔚来汽车公布财报，2025年四季度盈利超12亿元。这是蔚来在连续多个季度亏损数十亿元后，首次单季度盈利。 在这份盈利的财报背后，李斌对企业进行了一系列改革以严控成本，同时也将部分投入巨大的业务做了拆分以改善财务结构。 芯片业务无疑是蔚来最“烧钱”的业务之一。李斌曾在2025年的中国电动汽车百人会论坛上，测算过NX9031芯片的研发成本——一颗NX9031神玑芯片的研发投入，足以建成1000 座换电站。 36氪也曾报道过，在没有独立拆分之前，蔚来的芯片团队规模异常齐全，从前端设计、后端设计，到测试，有600多人，接近一个标准芯片公司的配置。 但如今，蔚来将从这项业务中

item.title: JPMorgan shuts China tycoon’s account that made millions for bank: Sources
item.description: [Straits Times] Tang Hao had a $5.1 billion stake in US ad-tech firm AppLovin Corp as at early 2025.

item.title: 三星前技术专家创业，为机器人做端侧“通信小脑”，获千万级融资｜硬氪首发
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 乔钰杰 编辑 | 袁斯来 硬氪获悉，上海乾径科技有限公司（下称“乾径科技”）近日宣布完成Pre-A轮融资，融资金额为千万级人民币，本轮由启盈同创独家投资。资金将重点用于端侧连接智能“推理与决策中间层”（Connectivity Brain）的模型迭代、工具链产品化交付。 随着具身智能、无人系统等应用逐渐进入工厂、园区等真实场景，行业面临的关键问题正在从“动作能力”转向“连接能力”。在复杂物理环境中，机器人或无人设备往往需要依赖无线网络进行数据传输与协同控制，而网络时延、丢包与抖动等问题，会直接影响系统稳定性。 当前，部分科技公司

item.title: HSBC mulls over job cuts that could impact around 20,000 roles from AI-driven overhaul: Sources
item.description: [Straits Times] Non-client facing roles in global service centres are among those expected to be most impacted.

item.title: China AI startup Moonshot snags funds at US$18 billion valuation
item.description: [Business Times] [BEIJING] Moonshot AI is seeking to raise as much as US$1 billion in an expanded funding round that would value the startup...

item.title: US Commerce Department withdraws planned rule on AI chip exports
item.description: [Business Times] [NEW YORK] The US Commerce Department withdrew a planned rule on artificial intelligence (AI) chip exports on Friday (Mar 13), the latest...

item.title: The price isn’t right: Oil spike fuels risks in South-east Asia’s tech scene
item.description: [Business Times] RISING oil prices triggered by the ongoing war in the Middle East could quickly drive up operating costs within South-east Asia’s tech...

item.title: Salesforce Agentforce: What you need to know
item.description: [MarTech] We've updated our page on Agentforce with details of the Agentforce Contact Center release. The post Salesforce Agentforce: What you need to know appeared first on MarTech.
